<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Portfolio | SPEC Media Group</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Barlow:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
  :root { --gold:#F5A800; --gold-light:#FFF8E7; --gold-dim:#c98a00; --black:#111111; --dark:#1a1a1a; --mid:#2d2d2d; --gray:#888888; --light:#f4f4f4; --white:#ffffff; }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
  body { background:var(--black); color:var(--white); font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif; font-weight:400; line-height:1.6; overflow-x:hidden; }

  nav { position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:1000; background:rgba(17,17,17,0.97); border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold); padding:0 48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; height:70px; backdrop-filter:blur(10px); }
  .nav-logo { font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:1.3rem; letter-spacing:3px; color:var(--white); text-decoration:none; white-space:nowrap; }
  .nav-logo span { color:var(--gold); }
  .nav-links { display:flex; gap:8px; list-style:none; align-items:center; }
  .nav-links > li > a { color:var(--white); text-decoration:none; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:8px 14px; display:block; transition:color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links > li > a:hover, .nav-links > li > a.active { color:var(--gold); }
  .dropdown { position:relative; }
  .dropdown-menu { display:none; position:absolute; top:100%; left:0; background:var(--dark); border:1px solid rgba(245,168,0,0.2); border-top:2px solid var(--gold); min-width:200px; z-index:1001; }
  .dropdown:hover .dropdown-menu { display:block; }
  .dropdown-menu a { display:block; padding:12px 20px; color:var(--white); text-decoration:none; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); transition:background 0.2s,color 0.2s; }
  .dropdown-menu a:hover { background:rgba(245,168,0,0.1); color:var(--gold); }
  .dropdown > a::after { content:' ▾'; font-size:0.7rem; }
  .nav-cta { background:var(--gold); color:var(--black); padding:10px 24px; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; display:inline-block; transition:background 0.2s; white-space:nowrap; }
  .nav-cta:hover { background:var(--gold-dim); color:var(--white); }

  .page-hero { min-height:50vh; background:var(--dark); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; padding:140px 48px 80px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .page-hero::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 80px,rgba(245,168,0,0.03) 80px,rgba(245,168,0,0.03) 81px),repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,transparent 80px,rgba(245,168,0,0.03) 80px,rgba(245,168,0,0.03) 81px); }
  .page-hero::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:3px; background:var(--gold); }
  .hero-content { position:relative; z-index:2; max-width:700px; }
  .page-eyebrow { font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:5px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:20px; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 0.2s; }
  .page-hero h1 { font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,6rem); line-height:0.95; letter-spacing:3px; color:var(--white); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:24px; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 0.4s; }
  .page-hero h1 span { color:var(--gold); }
  .page-hero p { font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:300; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65); line-height:1.8; max-width:560px; margin:0 auto; opacity:0; animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 0.6s; }

  /* FILTER BAR */
  .filter-bar { background:var(--black); padding:32px 80px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); position:sticky; top:70px; z-index:100; }
  .filter-inner { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; }
  .filter-btn { padding:10px 20px; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); background:transparent; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.2s; font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif; }
  .filter-btn:hover { border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold); }
  .filter-btn.active { background:var(--gold); color:var(--black); border-color:var(--gold); }

  /* PORTFOLIO GRID */
  .portfolio-section { background:var(--black); padding:80px; }
  .portfolio-inner { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; }

  /* Featured piece */
  .portfolio-featured { margin-bottom:4px; }
  .portfolio-featured-item { width:100%; height:500px; background:var(--mid); position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:flex; align-items:flex-end; padding:32px; cursor:pointer; }
  .portfolio-featured-item::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%,transparent 60%); z-index:1; }
  .portfolio-featured-item:hover .portfolio-overlay { opacity:1; }
  .portfolio-featured-label { position:relative; z-index:2; }
  .portfolio-category { font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:8px; }
  .portfolio-title { font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:1.8rem; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--white); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .portfolio-desc { font-size:0.82rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-weight:300; }
  .portfolio-placeholder-content { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; z-index:0; }
  .play-circle { width:72px; height:72px; border:2px solid rgba(245,168,0,0.5); border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:1.8rem; color:var(--gold); transition:all 0.3s; }
  .portfolio-featured-item:hover .play-circle { background:var(--gold); color:var(--black); border-color:var(--gold); }
  .placeholder-label { font-size:0.7rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2); letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; }

  /* Main grid */
  .portfolio-main-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:4px; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .portfolio-item { background:var(--mid); position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:flex; align-items:flex-end; padding:20px; cursor:pointer; aspect-ratio:1; }
  .portfolio-item::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%,transparent 60%); z-index:1; transition:opacity 0.3s; }
  .portfolio-item:hover::before { opacity:0.5; }
  .portfolio-item-inner { position:relative; z-index:2; }
  .pi-category { font-size:0.6rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:4px; }
  .pi-title { font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; color:var(--white); }
  .item-placeholder { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; z-index:0; }
  .item-play { width:44px; height:44px; border:2px solid rgba(245,168,0,0.4); border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:var(--gold); font-size:1rem; transition:all 0.3s; }
  .portfolio-item:hover .item-play { background:var(--gold); color:var(--black); border-color:var(--gold); }
  .item-label { font-size:0.6rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; }

  /* Wide item */
  .portfolio-wide-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr; gap:4px; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .portfolio-wide { background:var(--mid); height:300px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:flex; align-items:flex-end; padding:24px; cursor:pointer; }
  .portfolio-wide::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%,transparent 60%); z-index:1; }

  /* COMING SOON */
  .coming-soon-section { background:var(--dark); padding:80px; text-align:center; }
  .coming-soon-section h3 { font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:2rem; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .coming-soon-section p { font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--gray); font-weight:300; max-width:500px; margin:0 auto 40px; line-height:1.8; }
  .instagram-cta { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; background:transparent; border:2px solid var(--gold); color:var(--gold); padding:16px 32px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.2s; }
  .instagram-cta:hover { background:var(--gold); color:var(--black); }

  /* CTA */
  .cta-banner { background:var(--gold); padding:80px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:48px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .cta-banner h2 { font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem); letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--black); line-height:1; }
  .cta-banner p { color:rgba(0,0,0,0.6); font-size:1rem; margin-top:10px; font-weight:300; max-width:420px; }
  .cta-btns { display:flex; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .btn-black { background:var(--black); color:var(--gold); padding:16px 36px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; display:inline-block; border:2px solid var(--black); transition:all 0.2s; }
  .btn-black:hover { background:transparent; color:var(--black); }
  .btn-black-outline { background:transparent; color:var(--black); padding:16px 36px; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; border:2px solid var(--black); text-decoration:none; display:inline-block; transition:all 0.2s; }
  .btn-black-outline:hover { background:var(--black); color:var(--gold); }

  footer { background:var(--black); border-top:2px solid var(--gold); padding:72px 80px 40px; }
  .footer-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:48px; margin-bottom:56px; }
  .footer-logo { font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:1.4rem; letter-spacing:3px; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:12px; display:block; text-decoration:none; }
  .footer-logo span { color:var(--gold); }
  .footer-tagline { font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--gray); line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:16px; font-weight:300; }
  .footer-location { font-size:0.72rem; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .footer-col h4 { font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:20px; padding-bottom:10px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(245,168,0,0.2); }
  .footer-col ul { list-style:none; }
  .footer-col ul li { margin-bottom:10px; }
  .footer-col ul li a { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-decoration:none; font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:300; transition:color 0.2s; }
  .footer-col ul li a:hover { color:var(--gold); }
  .footer-contact p { font-size:0.85rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-weight:300; margin-bottom:8px; line-height:1.6; }
  .footer-contact a { color:var(--gold); text-decoration:none; }
  .footer-bottom { border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top:28px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:16px; }
  .footer-bottom p { font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--gray); }
  .footer-legal { display:flex; gap:24px; }
  .footer-legal a { font-size:0.72rem; color:var(--gray); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.2s; }
  .footer-legal a:hover { color:var(--gold); }

  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(30px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }

  @media (max-width:900px) {
    nav { padding:0 24px; }
    .nav-links { display:none; }
    .page-hero { padding:120px 32px 60px; }
    .filter-bar { padding:24px 32px; }
    .portfolio-section { padding:48px 32px; }
    .portfolio-main-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .portfolio-wide-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .coming-soon-section { padding:60px 32px; }
    .cta-banner { padding:60px 32px; flex-direction:column; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    footer { padding:60px 32px 32px; }
  }
  @media (max-width:600px) {
    .portfolio-main-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .portfolio-featured-item { height:300px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo"><span>SPEC</span> Media Group</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="dropdown">
      <a href="media-services.html" class="active">SPEC Media</a>
      <div class="dropdown-menu">
        <a href="media-services.html">Media Services</a>
        <a href="portfolio.html">Portfolio</a>
      </div>
    </li>
    <li class="dropdown">
      <a href="marketing-services.html">SPEC Marketing</a>
      <div class="dropdown-menu">
        <a href="marketing-services.html">Marketing Services</a>
        <a href="packages.html">Packages</a>
      </div>
    </li>
    <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="contact.html">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="contact.html" class="nav-cta">Book Now</a>
</nav>

<div class="page-hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="page-eyebrow">SPEC Media Group &nbsp;·&nbsp; Our Work</p>
    <h1>The <span>Portfolio</span></h1>
    <p>A growing collection of video production, photography, real estate, and event coverage work for businesses across the Greater Philadelphia Area.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FILTER BAR -->
<div class="filter-bar">
  <div class="filter-inner">
    <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="filterPortfolio('all', this)">All Work</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterPortfolio('video', this)">Video Production</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterPortfolio('photo', this)">Photography</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterPortfolio('realestate', this)">Real Estate</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterPortfolio('events', this)">Events</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PORTFOLIO GRID -->
<div class="portfolio-section">
  <div class="portfolio-inner">

    <!-- FEATURED -->
    <div class="portfolio-featured">
      <div class="portfolio-featured-item" data-category="video">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="SPEC Media Group"/>
        <div class="portfolio-featured-label">
          <p class="portfolio-category">Event Coverage &nbsp;·&nbsp; Motorsport</p>
          <h2 class="portfolio-title">Toyota GR Racing</h2>
          <p class="portfolio-desc">Rockstar Energy &nbsp;·&nbsp; Event Photography</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 3 COLUMN GRID -->
    <div class="portfolio-main-grid" style="margin-top:4px;">
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="photo">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"><span style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;">Photo Coming Soon</span></div>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Photography</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Commercial Photography</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="events">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="SPEC Media Group"/>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Event Coverage</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Souped Up Saturdays — Nissan GT-R</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="events">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"><span style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;">Photo Coming Soon</span></div>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Event Coverage</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Souped Up Saturdays</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="photo">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="SPEC Media Group"/>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Commercial Photography</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Tree State Property Maintenance</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="photo">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"><span style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;">Photo Coming Soon</span></div>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Photography</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Automotive Portrait</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="photo">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"><span style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;">Photo Coming Soon</span></div>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Photography</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Automotive Detail</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- WIDE + TALL -->
    <div class="portfolio-wide-grid" style="margin-top:4px;">
      <div class="portfolio-wide" data-category="photo">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="SPEC Media Group"/>
        <div class="portfolio-featured-label" style="position:relative;z-index:2;">
          <p class="portfolio-category">Commercial Photography &nbsp;·&nbsp; Tree State</p>
          <h2 class="portfolio-title" style="font-size:1.4rem;">On-Site Commercial Shoot</h2>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="events" style="aspect-ratio:auto;height:300px;">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;"><span style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;">Photo Coming Soon</span></div>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Events</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Souped Up Saturdays</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SECOND ROW -->
    <div class="portfolio-main-grid" style="margin-top:4px;">
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="photo">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="SPEC Media Group"/>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Commercial Photography</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Corvette — Wheel Detail</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="photo">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="SPEC Media Group"/>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Commercial Photography</p>
          <p class="pi-title">SLM Detail — Detailing Service</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="portfolio-item" data-category="events">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="SPEC Media Group"/>
        <div class="portfolio-item-inner">
          <p class="pi-category">Event Coverage</p>
          <p class="pi-title">Farmers Market — Vendor Coverage</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- COMING SOON -->
<div class="coming-soon-section">
  <h3>Portfolio Growing Weekly</h3>
  <p>We're actively shooting for clients across the Greater Philadelphia Area. New work added regularly — check back often.</p>
  
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="cta-banner">
  <div>
    <h2>Ready To Be In<br/>The Portfolio?</h2>
    <p>Let's create content that showcases your business the right way. Book a shoot and let's get to work.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cta-btns">
    <a href="contact.html" class="btn-black">Book A Shoot</a>
    <a href="media-services.html" class="btn-black-outline">View Services</a>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div>
      <a href="index.html" class="footer-logo"><span>SPEC</span> Media Group</a>
      <p class="footer-tagline">Specialized Photography, Entertainment & Commercial. Professional creative production and digital marketing for businesses across the Greater Philadelphia Area.</p>
      <p class="footer-location">Greater Philadelphia Area</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>SPEC Media</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="media-services.html">Media Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="portfolio.html">Portfolio</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>SPEC Marketing</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="marketing-services.html">Marketing Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="packages.html">Packages & Pricing</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col footer-contact">
      <h4>Get In Touch</h4>
      <p>📞 <a href="tel:2152007740">(215) 200-7740</a></p>
      <p>✉️ <a href="mailto:hello@specmg.com">hello@specmg.com</a></p>
      <p>🌐 specmg.com</p>
      <p style="margin-top:16px;"></p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">
    <p>&copy; 2026 SPEC Media Group. All rights reserved.</p>
    <div class="footer-legal"><a href="#">Privacy Policy</a><a href="#">Terms & Conditions</a></div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
function nav(url) {
  window.location.href = url;
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
